Skip to main content HOME search Ctrl+K school notifications_none 1 light_mode Admin, Forge menu arrow_back Back ACCOUNT SETTINGS person Profile home Contact & Address emergency Emergency Contact assignment_ind Employee Onboarding check_circle description Tax & Compliance expand_more folder Documents payments Pay Stubs receipt_long Tax Documents lock Security palette Customization extension Integrations forum Communications palette CUSTOMIZATION COLOR THEME Choose between light and dark mode. LIGHT DARK TEXT SIZE Adjust the text size across the application. Changes take effect immediately. DEFAULT 12px Aa COMFORTABLE 14px Aa LARGE 16px Aa EXTRA LARGE 18px Aa CHAT NOTIFICATIONS Control sound, vibration, and popup behavior for incoming chat messages. volume_up Notification sound ON vibration Vibration (mobile) ON picture_in_picture Desktop preview popups ON NOTIFICATION SOUND DEFAULT CHIME BELL POP KEEP UNSAVED WORK FOR When a form has unsaved changes, they are saved automatically. Choose how long to keep them before they expire. 1 DAY 3 DAYS 1 WEEK 2 WEEKS AMBIENT MODE IDLE TIMEOUT How long to wait before automatically entering ambient (read-only) display mode after no activity. OFF 1 MINUTE 5 MINUTES 15 MINUTES 30 MINUTES 1 HOUR

Skip to main content HOME light_mode Admin, Forge menu assignment_ind New Employee Onboarding 1 Personal Info 2 Address 3 Federal Tax 4 State Tax 5 I-9 6 Direct Deposit 7 Acknowledge Personal Information This information is used to pre-fill your W-4, I-9, and state withholding forms. Enter it once here — you won't need to re-enter it on each form. First Name Middle Name Last Name Other Last Names Used (since age 16) Date of Birth Social Security Number lock Securely stored — leave blank to keep, or enter a new value to overwrite. Email Address Phone Number lock Your SSN and date of birth are encrypted and used only for official tax form submission. They are never stored in plain text. CONTINUE arrow_forward
